notes: 2026-05-09: Task 10: Implemented LineLayout struct (line_layout.rs) for efficient byte-offset <-> (line,col) mapping via binary_search. O(n) build, O(log n) lookup. 18 TDD tests covering empty string, single/multi-line, trailing newlines, consecutive newlines, clamping, round-trip, unicode. Re-exported from motif_core::input. PR #74 (branch repo-assist/improve-line-layout-multiline). Resolves p3 spool task 'Implement line layout system for multiline'. Task 7: Verified all 5 open issues have correct labels - no changes needed. Remaining unimplemented spool tasks without a PR: 'Vertical scrolling multiline (p3)' (next after PR #73+#74 merge), 'Move hardcoded colors to Theme (p3)' (needs #44), 'Double-click word selection wiring' (needs #36+#64), 'Triple-click line selection wiring' (needs #36+#64). Next run priorities: task_5_maintain_prs (2026-04-29 oldest), task_1_triage (2026-05-08), task_2_fix_prs (2026-05-01).

vertical_cursor_movement_pr_2026_05_08.spool_task: Implement vertical cursor movement (up/down) (p3, text-input-rewrite stream)
vertical_cursor_movement_pr_2026_05_08.approach: Content-level grapheme column tracking. Preferred column preserved across consecutive moves through shorter lines. Horizontal navigation clears preferred_col. Upgrade path: pixel-precise movement possible after PR #70 merges (adds index_for_point to TextLayout) and PR #74 merges (adds LineLayout).

line_layout_multiline_pr_2026_05_09.spool_task: Implement line layout system for multiline (p3, text-input-rewrite stream)
line_layout_multiline_pr_2026_05_09.approach: Vec<usize> of line starts computed O(n) once; binary_search for O(log n) line_for_offset. Provides foundation for vertical scroll offset calculation and upgrade path for move_up/move_down in PR #73.
